redis.clients.jedis.bloom.commands

Interface BloomFilterCommands

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    RedisBloomCommands, RedisModuleCommands
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    JedisCluster, JedisPooled, JedisSharding, UnifiedJedis

    public interface BloomFilterCommands
